explanations.6: os.path.splitext splits a filename into two parts: the name and the extension, so [1] grabs just the extension part like '.py'.
explanations.22: dirs[:] = ... replaces the list in-place so that os.walk won't descend into hidden folders (starting with '.') or __pycache__; this saves time scanning.
explanations.26: counts.get(cat, 0) returns the current count for that category, or 0 if it doesn't exist yet, so we can safely add 1 to it.
explanations.54: subprocess.run executes the mmdc command-line tool with these arguments to convert the Mermaid diagram file into a PNG image; check=True makes it error if the command fails.
